io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.xml.XmlBean

Packages that use XmlBean
Package
Description
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.base
Base classes for SIP entities.
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.control
Contains classes that represent SIP control entities.
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.control.cfg
 
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.notify
Contains all the SIP NOTIFY message related classes.
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.query
Contains classes that represent XML elements.
io.github.lunasaw.gb28181.common.entity.response
Contains all the response classes.
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.api
 
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.eventbus.event

  • Uses of XmlBean in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.api

    Methods in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.api with parameters of type XmlBean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    NotifyListener.onUnknownNotify(String platformId, XmlBean notify)
    框架内部分发兜底：当 ClientNotifyEvent 携带的 notify 类不属于已知类型时调用。 业务方一般无需 override；保留此 hook 用于诊断和未来 notify 子类的扩展。
